cards.body: Who the hotel is best for: business, leisure, family, couples, events, wellness, long stay, or city break.

items.question: What is AI discovery for hotels?
items.answer: It is the way travelers find, compare, and choose hotels through AI search, answer engines, and conversational planning assistants.

items.question: How does AI search change hotel SEO?
items.answer: It increases the importance of clear facts, structured pages, useful answers, schema, fresh content, and source-worthy pages.

items.question: Is AEO different from SEO?
items.answer: AEO focuses on making content easy for answer engines to extract and explain. SEO still matters, but AEO puts more emphasis on direct answers, entity clarity, and structured data.

items.question: Where does Wink fit?
items.answer: Wink connects hotel supply, content, partner demand, and Booking Engine paths so AI discovery becomes a bookable, attributed direct booking - at 5.5% all-in.

fields.heading: Ready to make hotel demand bookable?
fields.body: Start with the route that matches your team, then move into a focused demo or sign-up flow.
